plugins.name: agile-workflow
plugins.description: Agile backlog workflow skills for Azure DevOps. First skill, decompose-backlog: takes a parent work item (Epic/Feature), splits it into right-sized Stories (1 Story = 1 sprint = 1 PR), drafts and enriches them, creates them in Azure DevOps correctly parented to the Feature, then audits requirement coverage. Self-contained decomposition rules + Azure linking guardrails.
